examples: Today, energy storage is a $33 billion global industry that generates nearly 100 gigawatt-hours of electricity per year.
This is the first wind farm in the 10 gigawatt mega-project.
Wind costs more than $2.5 billion per gigawatt to build, compared with $600 million for gas.
Output this financial year has passed a previous record of 3, 890 gigawatt hours (GWh).
The goal is to produce a gigawatt of energy in years, not decades.
